---
title: "Drafts"
listing:
  - contents: [".", "!./*.qmd"]
    include:
      type: post
      draft: true
    sort:
      - "date desc"
      - "title desc"
    sort-ui: true
    filter-ui: true
  - contents: [".", "!./*.qmd"]
    include:
      type: draft
    sort:
      - "date desc"
      - "title desc"
    sort-ui: true
    filter-ui: true
---
